demographics.living_situation: lives alone; describes intense social isolation

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain down in my pelvis is unbearable and it's been building for a day now, but I will not let another doctor force me onto an examination table without my consent. I'm on the phone because I can't do a hospital.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pelvic pain has become intolerable over the last 24 hours and the patient feels hot and shaky, but is terrified of clinical settings and is refusing to attend an emergency department.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 24 hours ago and has been getting steadily worse
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, severe ache low down in the pelvis and lower belly, right where I have scar tissue from old operations
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable, the worst it has been; I'm stuck in bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in the middle of my pelvis and lower abdomen, over the area of old surgery
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening, not coming in waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; lying very still helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, and the panic makes everything feel worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling hot and sweaty, heart pounding, breathing fast because I'm so frightened of being examined
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: chronic pelvic pain for years from the scar tissue, but nothing this bad this quickly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound today; can't manage normal activities

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born with variations in my anatomy; had surgeries as a child that I never consented to, and chronic pelvic pain ever since from the scarring
past_medical_history.how_managed: ongoing chronic pain; I avoid doctors as much as I can

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my gonads were removed when I was young, so I have to be on hormone replacement for life
severe trauma and panic around medical care and examinations
past_medical_history.how_managed: I mostly cope by avoiding the medical system

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone and feels very isolated. Deep distrust of the medical system after non-consensual childhood surgery. Avoids the pharmacy because the interaction is distressing, so hormone doses get missed. Refuses emergency departments and clinical facilities.

communication_style.typical_message_style: Sets clear boundaries first; watchful and easily startled; needs control and consent respected before engaging.

reluctance_topics: physical examination of the genital or pelvic area

access_barriers.other: Profound institutional distrust and medical PTSD leading to avoidance of routine and emergency care.

objective_data_offered.value: 37.6 degrees on my home thermometer about an hour ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: on video the patient looks flushed and sweaty, is sitting rigidly on the edge of the bed guarding the lower abdomen, and is breathing rapidly
my heart feels like it is pounding and racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective palpitations; no measured heart rate offered by the patient
